tagline: Headshots that look like you on a very good day.

hero.title: FrameForge headshot photography hero image
hero.alt: A photographer coaches a client during a professional headshot session beside softbox lighting, camera gear, and a proof-selection monitor.

contact.serviceArea: Professional headshots, brand photography, team portraits, LinkedIn refreshes, speaker images, website portraits, and studio or on-location sessions for North Loop, River Market, Oak Hill, Westbrook, and nearby offices

copy.heroTitle: Headshots that still look like you.
copy.heroText: FrameForge guides wardrobe, lighting, expression, usage needs, proof selection, and delivery so the final portraits feel current, credible, and recognizably human.
copy.introTitle: The best headshot is shaped before you choose it.
copy.introText: We talk about industry, usage, background, wardrobe, retouch comfort, and whether you need one strong portrait or a small brand set.
copy.quoteTitle: Ready to book a headshot slot?
copy.quoteText: Book the next step with role, usage needs, timeline, and any brand examples. We will recommend a session and prep path.

services.title: Individual Headshot
services.text: A guided session with lighting, posing, expression coaching, and a focused gallery for modern professional use.

services.title: Brand Mini Set
services.text: Headshots plus a few environmental or detail frames for websites, social profiles, and speaker pages.

services.title: Team Portrait Day
services.text: Consistent lighting, simple scheduling, and a clean handoff for small teams and offices.

process.title: Plan the use case
process.text: We ask where the photos will live, what tone they need, and what backgrounds make sense.

process.title: Prep the details
process.text: Wardrobe, grooming, glasses, retouch comfort, and arrival timing get handled before session day.

process.title: Choose and deliver
process.text: You select favorites with usage guidance, retouch notes, and clean export options.

proof.label: web, social, and print sizes available

serviceDetails.prepNote: We ask where the photos will live, what tone they need, and what backgrounds make sense.
serviceDetails.serviceRhythm: Gallery-proof flow for professional headshots, brand photography, team portraits, LinkedIn refreshes, speaker images, website portraits, and studio or on-location sessions across North Loop, River Market, Oak Hill, Westbrook, and nearby offices: role, usage, background, wardrobe, retouch comfort, and delivery format stay visible before booking.
